differential_diagnoses: Kaposi's varicelliform eruption (superimposed on chronic dermatitis)
next_steps: Excisional biopsy of enlarged inguinal lymph node for histopathology, immunohistochemistry, and T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies
Flow cytometry of peripheral blood for T-cell markers (CD3, CD4, CD8, CD7, CD26) to rule out Sézary cells
Whole-body PET/CT scan for metabolic evaluation of lymphadenopathy and pulmonary nodules
Biopsy of pulmonary nodule or bronchoscopy if clinically stable
Review of previous skin biopsy slides by expert dermatopathologist for clonal T-cell populations
Consultation with hematology-oncology for systemic staging
